query: Ugh, the living room is so dim. Hard to read there. The bathroom feels really dry. My skin feels tight after washing and the mirror did not fog up like usual.

steps.thought: The user complains about the living room being too dim and the bathroom being too dry. I need to check the current illuminance in the living room and humidity in the bathroom, as well as the available devices in both rooms to address these issues.
I need to check the devices in the living room to increase the light, and in the bathroom to increase humidity.
I need to check the devices in the bathroom to see if there is a humidifier to address the dryness.
The user wants to brighten the living room and humidify the bathroom. I will first turn on the living room light.
I have turned on the living room light. Now I need to address the dry bathroom by turning on a humidifier. I will turn on bathroom_humidifier_1.

I have turned on the light and the humidifier. To ensure the humidifier is working effectively, I should check the control rules for humidity to see if I need to adjust fan speed or set a target humidity.
